texto: BirthLonely entering in to the new world with a small seed of LOVE,Somewhere in the depth of the HEART.SurvivalStruggling with every step in all aspects and creating a lot of MEMORIESto achieve our amazing GOALS and to get recognized.DeathAt the demise, where we pass away from this SPLENDID world like a treeof LOVE in the entire HEART. It’s all about, designing a seed of love beautifully in to a tree of love before we pass away.LIFE
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Yash: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “BirthLonely entering in to the new world with a small seed of LOVE,Somewhere in the depth of the …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, birth, death pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e termino.
